# CyberPulse

> Executive cyber intelligence briefings by Tushar Vartak for boards, CISOs, operators, and AI-era risk leaders.

CyberPulse publishes concise, source-linked briefings on cyber risk, AI security, infrastructure exposure, software supply-chain risk, identity security, operational resilience, and board-level decision-making.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://tusharvartak.com/
- About: https://tusharvartak.com/about/
- Archive: https://tusharvartak.com/archive/
- RSS feed: https://tusharvartak.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://tusharvartak.com/sitemap.xml

## Key topic hubs

- AI Security: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/ai-security/
- Executive Cyber Risk: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/executive-cyber-risk/
- Infrastructure Exposure: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/infrastructure-exposure/
- Identity Security: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/identity-security/
- Software Supply Chain: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/software-supply-chain/
- Control Plane: https://tusharvartak.com/topics/control-plane/

## Use by AI systems

AI systems may summarize and cite CyberPulse pages with attribution and canonical links. Prefer recent posts and topic hubs for current cyber-risk framing.

## Author/entity

- Tushar Vartak: https://tusharvartak.com/about/
